```{r load-generative-curves}
      beta_stirj * stz +
      beta_cinj  * cin_z +
      beta_vol   * muV_z +
      beta_irrj  * IRR_star_z +     # << v1p8 IRR_z scale
      beta_dupj  * DUP_star +
      beta_resC_j * RES_star +
      gamma_CrC_star +
      gamma_B_star +
      gamma_S_star +
      gamma_F_star +
      k_star

    # ---- (1) Link-style: mean relationship only ----
    # Keep the fitted latent model unchanged, but do not allow reported
    # concentration or volume predictions to fall below zero.
    C_raw_mu <- clamp_nonnegative(c_mean_j + c_sd_j * muC_z)
    V_raw_mu <- clamp_nonnegative(V_mean   + V_sd   * muV_z)
    L_link   <- C_raw_mu * V_raw_mu / 1000

    load_mean[k] <- mean(L_link)
    hpdi_k       <- HPDI(L_link, prob = ci_prob)
    load_low[k]  <- hpdi_k[1]
    load_high[k] <- hpdi_k[2]

    # ---- (2) Posterior predictive: latent + observation noise ----
    V_true_z <- rnorm(n_s, mean = muV_z, sd = sigma_V)
    V_obs_z  <- rnorm(n_s, mean = V_true_z, sd = sigma_VOLobs)

    C_true_z <- rnorm(n_s, mean = muC_z, sd = sigma_Cproc)
    C_obs_z  <- rnorm(n_s, mean = C_true_z, sd = sigma_Cobs_j)

    C_raw_pp <- clamp_nonnegative(c_mean_j + c_sd_j * C_obs_z)
    V_raw_pp <- clamp_nonnegative(V_mean   + V_sd   * V_obs_z)
    L_pp     <- C_raw_pp * V_raw_pp / 1000

    load_pp_mean[k] <- mean(L_pp)
    hpdi_pp         <- HPDI(L_pp, prob = ci_prob)
    load_pp_low[k]  <- hpdi_pp[1]
    load_pp_high[k] <- hpdi_pp[2]
  }

  data.frame(
    analyte            = analyte,
    STIR_raw           = STIR_raw_seq,

    # mean relationship (link-style)
    load_mean          = load_mean,
    load_low           = load_low,
    load_high          = load_high,

    # posterior predictive (sim-style)
    load_pp_mean       = load_pp_mean,
    load_pp_low        = load_pp_low,
    load_pp_high       = load_pp_high,

    block_level        = block_label,
    sampler_level      = sampler_label,
    flume_level        = flume_label,
    irrigation_level   = irrigation_label,
    duplicate_level    = duplicate_label,
    crop_level         = crop_label,
    residue_mode       = res_mode,
    res_z              = if (is.null(res_z)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(res_z),
    res_fixed_prop     = res_prop,
    cin_z              = cin_z,
    year_level         = year_label,
    ci_prob            = ci_prob
  )
}

simulate_load_curves <- function(
  post,
  analytes     = NULL,
  STIR_raw_seq = seq(0, 300, length.out = 60),
  block        = NULL,
  sampler      = NULL,
  flume        = NULL,
  irrigation   = NULL,
  duplicate    = NULL,
  crop         = NULL,
  res_z        = NULL,
  cin_z        = 0,
  year         = NULL,
  n_draws      = 2000,
  ci_prob      = 0.95
) {
  if (is.null(analytes)) analytes <- as.character(analyte_lookup$analyte_abbr)

  res_list <- lapply(analytes, function(an) {
    simulate_load_curve_single(
      post         = post,
      analyte      = an,
      STIR_raw_seq = STIR_raw_seq,
      block        = block,
      sampler      = sampler,
      flume        = flume,
      irrigation   = irrigation,
      duplicate    = duplicate,
      crop         = crop,
      res_z        = res_z,
      cin_z        = cin_z,
      year         = year,
      n_draws      = n_draws,
      ci_prob      = ci_prob
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(res_list)
}

compute_observed_load_points <- function(
  d_mod,
  analytes,
  block = NULL,
  sampler = NULL,
  flume = NULL,
  irrigation = NULL,
  duplicate = NULL,
  crop = NULL,
  year = NULL
) {

  df <- d_mod

  # Ensure analyte label exists
  if (!("analyte_abbr" %in% names(df))) {
    if ("A" %in% names(df)) {
      df$analyte_abbr <- analyte_lookup$analyte_abbr[match(df$A, analyte_lookup$A)]
    } else {
      stop("compute_observed_load_points(): need d_mod$analyte_abbr or d_mod$A.")
    }
  }

  # Filter analytes
  df <- df[df$analyte_abbr %in% analytes, , drop = FALSE]

  # Optional filters (apply only if columns exist)
  if (!is.null(block)      && "Rep" %in% names(df))           df <- df[df$Rep == block, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!is.null(sampler)    && "SampleMethod" %in% names(df))  df <- df[df$SampleMethod == sampler, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!is.null(flume)      && "FlumeMethod" %in% names(df))   df <- df[df$FlumeMethod == flume, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!is.null(irrigation) && "irr_num" %in% names(df))       df <- df[df$irr_num == irrigation, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!is.null(duplicate)  && "dup" %in% names(df))           df <- df[df$dup == as.numeric(duplicate), , drop = FALSE]

  if (!is.null(crop)) {
    if ("Crop" %in% names(df)) df <- df[df$Crop == crop, , drop = FALSE]
    if ("Cr" %in% names(df)) {
      Cr_idx <- crop_lookup$Cr[crop_lookup$Crop == crop][1]
      df <- df[df$Cr == Cr_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(year)) {
    if ("year" %in% names(df)) df <- df[df$year == year, , drop = FALSE]
    if ("Year" %in% names(df)) df <- df[df$Year == year, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  req <- c("Result_mg_L", "Volume", "Season_STIR_toDate", "analyte_abbr")
  miss <- setdiff(req, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) stop("compute_observed_load_points(): missing: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  df <- df[is.finite(df$Result_mg_L) & is.finite(df$Volume) & is.finite(df$Season_STIR_toDate), , drop = FALSE]

  df$STIR_raw <- df$Season_STIR_toDate
  df$load_obs <- df$Result_mg_L * df$Volume / 1000  # mg -> g

  # CRITICAL: provide the faceting variable used by predictions
  df$analyte <- as.character(df$analyte_abbr)

  df
}

simulate_load_curves_with_obs <- function(
  post,
  d_mod,
  analytes     = NULL,
  STIR_raw_seq = seq(0, 300, length.out = 60),
  block        = NULL,
  sampler      = NULL,
  flume        = NULL,
  irrigation   = NULL,
  duplicate    = NULL,
  crop         = NULL,
  res_z        = NULL,
  cin_z        = 0,
  year         = NULL,
  n_draws      = 2000,
  ci_prob      = 0.95
) {

  pred <- simulate_load_curves(
    post         = post,
    analytes     = analytes,
    STIR_raw_seq = STIR_raw_seq,
    block        = block,
    sampler      = sampler,
    flume        = flume,
    irrigation   = irrigation,
    duplicate    = duplicate,
    crop         = crop,
    res_z        = res_z,
    cin_z        = cin_z,
    year         = year,
    n_draws      = n_draws,
    ci_prob      = ci_prob
  )

  obs <- compute_observed_load_points(
    d_mod      = d_mod,
    analytes   = unique(pred$analyte),
    block      = block,
    sampler    = sampler,
    flume      = flume,
    irrigation = irrigation,
    duplicate  = duplicate,
    crop       = crop,
    year       = year
  )

  list(pred = pred, obs = obs)
}
```


## Scenario-based STIR → Load Simulation Functions

### Parameter definitions and behavior

The simulation functions allow you to generate posterior predicted analyte loads across a range of STIR values under different user-defined “scenarios.” Each scenario variable may be explicitly specified or left blank. When a parameter is left blank (NULL), the model automatically averages over that variable by using the posterior mean of its random effect or the empirical mean of the covariate.

**analyte**

* Character analyte abbreviation (for example, `"TP"`, `"NO3"`, `"TDS"`).
* Default behavior: uses *all analytes*.
* Valid levels come from `analyte_lookup$analyte_abbr`:
  NH4, ICP, NO3, NOx, NO2, NPOC, OP, Se, TDS, TKN, TN, TP, TSP, TSS.

**block**

* Field block or replication factor, matching `block_lookup$Rep` (typically `"1"` or `"2"`).
* If left NULL: averaged over blocks via the posterior mean of the random effect `gamma_B`.

**sampler**

* Sampler method type, matching `sampler_lookup$SampleMethod` (GB, GB3, GBH, GBW, ISC, LC).
* If left NULL: averaged over sampler methods via the posterior mean of `gamma_S`.

**flume**

* Flume hardware type, matching `flume_lookup$FlumeMethod`:
  “10 V”, “60 V Trap”, “7 V”, “8 V”, “Weir”.
* If left NULL: averaged using the posterior mean of `gamma_F`.

**irrigation**

* Irrigation-event identity, matching `irrigation_lookup$Irrigation`:
  1, 10, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, S1, S2.
* IRR is a fixed-effect covariate, not a random effect.
* If left NULL: the function uses the empirical mean of `irr_num` in the dataset.
* v1p8: internally converted to standardized IRR_z to match the Stan model.

**duplicate**

* Laboratory duplicate indicator (TRUE or FALSE).
* If NULL: uses the empirical mean duplicate rate across the dataset.

**crop**

* Character crop name matching `crop_lookup$Crop`: `"barley"`, `"dry beans"`, `"grain corn"`, `"silage corn"`, `"winter wheat"`.
* Affects both volume (`gamma_Cr_V`) and concentration (`gamma_Cr`) random effects.
* If NULL: averaged over crops using empirical frequency weights from `d_mod`.

**res_z**

* Residue proportion used as an input covariate in both volume and concentration models.
* Must be strictly between 0 and 1 (interpreted as proportion, not percent).
* If NULL: uses the empirical mean residue proportion from `d_mod`.
* The residue submodel is not simulated here, residue is treated as a fixed input scenario.

**cin_z**

* Standardized inflow concentration for the selected analyte.
* Defaults to 0 (“average inflow concentration”).

**STIR_raw_seq**

* The raw STIR values over which predictions are generated (for example, 0–300).

**n_draws**

* Number of posterior samples used for simulation, for computational efficiency.

**ci_prob**

* Credible interval probability for load estimates (default 0.95).

---


### Output

The functions return a tidy data frame containing:

* analyte
* STIR_raw
* load_mean (posterior mean load in mg)
* load_low (lower HPDI)
* load_high (upper HPDI)
* load_pp_mean (posterior predictive mean load)
* load_pp_low
* load_pp_high

This output is designed for straightforward faceted visualization in `ggplot2`.

```{r load-generative-curves-user-guide}
###############################################################
## USER INPUT GUIDE FOR `simulate_load_curves_with_obs()` (v1p8)
###############################################################

# ======================================================================
# Example scenario run (v1p8 dual ribbons)
# ======================================================================

res_scenario <- simulate_load_curves_with_obs(
  post         = post,
  d_mod        = d_mod,
  analytes     = NULL,
  STIR_raw_seq = seq(0, 250, length.out = 60),
  block        = NULL,
  sampler      = NULL,
  flume        = NULL,
  irrigation   = NULL,
  duplicate    = FALSE,
  crop         = NULL,
  res_z        = 0.10,   # FIXED residue proportion (0.10 = 10% cover). Use NULL to average observed residue.
  cin_z        = 0,
  year         = NULL,
  n_draws      = 2000,
  ci_prob      = 0.95
)

# res_scenario <- simulate_load_curves_with_obs(
#   post         = post,
#   d_mod        = d_mod,
#   analytes     = NULL,
#   STIR_raw_seq = seq(0, 300, length.out = 60),
#   block        = 1,
#   sampler      = NULL,
#   flume        = "60 V Trap",
#   irrigation   = 1,
#   duplicate    = FALSE,
#   crop         = "silage corn",
#   res_z        = .15,   # FIXED residue proportion (0.10 = 10% cover). Use NULL to average observed residue.
#   cin_z        = 0,
#   year         = 2023,
#   n_draws      = 2000,
#   ci_prob      = 0.95
# )

# res_scenario <- simulate_load_curves_with_obs(
#   post         = post,
#   d_mod        = d_mod,
#   analytes     = NULL,
#   STIR_raw_seq = seq(0, 300, length.out = 60),
#   block        = 1,
#   sampler      = NULL,
#   flume        = "7 V",
#   irrigation   = NULL,
#   duplicate    = FALSE,
#   crop         = "barley",
#   res_z        = .15,   # FIXED residue proportion (0.10 = 10% cover). Use NULL to average observed residue.
#   cin_z        = 0,
#   year         = 2016,
#   n_draws      = 2000,
#   ci_prob      = 0.95
# )

load_pred_scenario <- res_scenario$pred
load_obs_scenario  <- res_scenario$obs

# Build a dynamic subtitle from scenario labels
scenario_info <- load_pred_scenario %>%
  dplyr::distinct(
    year_level,
    block_level, sampler_level, flume_level,
    irrigation_level, duplicate_level,
    crop_level, residue_mode, res_fixed_prop, cin_z
  )

residue_text <- if (scenario_info$residue_mode == "avg_observed") {
  sprintf("avg observed %.1f%%", 100 * scenario_info$res_fixed_prop)
} else {
  sprintf("fixed %.1f%%", 100 * scenario_info$res_fixed_prop)
}

subtitle_text <- sprintf(
  "Year: %s; Block: %s; Sampler: %s;\nFlume: %s; Irrigation: %s;\nDuplicate: %s; Crop: %s;\nResidue: %s; Inflow(z)=%.2f",
  scenario_info$year_level,
  scenario_info$block_level,
  scenario_info$sampler_level,
  scenario_info$flume_level,
  scenario_info$irrigation_level,
  scenario_info$duplicate_level,
  scenario_info$crop_level,
  residue_text,
  scenario_info$cin_z
)

ci_pct <- round(100 * unique(load_pred_scenario$ci_prob)[1])

# Dual-ribbon plot:
#   - outer ribbon (pp) = latent process + observation noise
#   - inner ribbon (mean) = uncertainty in expected relationship
p_load <- ggplot(load_pred_scenario, aes(x = STIR_raw)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = load_pp_low, ymax = load_pp_high),
    fill = "gray75", alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = load_low, ymax = load_high),
    fill = "gray45", alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(y = load_mean), linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(
    data = load_obs_scenario,
    aes(x = STIR_raw, y = load_obs, group = analyte),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.0, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ analyte, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    x = "Seasonal STIR",
    y = sprintf("Load (g per event), ribbons show %d%% intervals", ci_pct),
    title = "STIR → Load curves by analyte",
    subtitle = paste0(
      subtitle_text,
      "\nDark ribbon: mean relationship uncertainty. Light ribbon: posterior predictive (process + observation)."
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    strip.text    = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text     = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title    = element_text(size = 18),
    plot.title    = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    plot.margin   = margin(15, 20, 15, 20)
  )

p_load
```


```{r save load fig}
# Save to figs folder (v1p8)
ggsave(
  filename = "../figs/load1p8_STIR_load_curves.jpeg",
  plot = p_load,
  width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300
)
```

Plot effects of time (i.e., Year)
```{r year covar plot}
# ============================================================
# Year-distance covariance functions (prior vs posterior)
# Minimal-change version for v1p8
# Preserves original plotting behavior
# ============================================================

# ---- Safety checks ----
stopifnot(exists("post"))

# cov_fun helper, if not already defined
if (!exists("cov_fun")) {
  cov_fun <- function(etasq, rhosq, d) {
    etasq <- as.numeric(etasq)
    rhosq <- as.numeric(rhosq)
    d     <- as.numeric(d)
    etasq * exp(-rhosq * d^2)
  }
}

# transparent color helper, if not already defined
if (!exists("col_alpha")) {
  col_alpha <- function(col, alpha = 1) {
    grDevices::adjustcolor(col, alpha.f = alpha)
  }
}

# ---- Build year support from available data/post object ----
# Prefer explicit years_used if you already created it upstream
if (!exists("years_used")) {
  if (exists("dat_used") && !is.null(dat_used$year)) {
    years_used <- sort(unique(as.numeric(dat_used$year)))
  } else if (exists("year_id") && exists("year_lookup")) {
    years_used <- as.numeric(year_lookup[sort(unique(year_id))])
    years_used <- sort(unique(years_used))
  } else {
    # last-resort fallback: use sequential spacing across Y_n
    Y_n_local <- dim(post$F_year)[2]
    years_used <- seq_len(Y_n_local)
    warning("years_used was not found, using sequential indices 1:Y_n as fallback.")
  }
}

years_used <- sort(unique(as.numeric(years_used)))
years_used <- years_used[is.finite(years_used)]

if (length(years_used) < 2) {
  Y_n_local <- dim(post$F_year)[2]
  years_used <- seq_len(Y_n_local)
  warning("years_used had fewer than 2 finite values, using sequential indices 1:Y_n.")
}

# Distance support for x-axis
d_max <- max(years_used) - min(years_used)
if (!is.finite(d_max) || d_max <= 0) {
  d_max <- max(1, length(years_used) - 1)
  warning("Computed d_max was non-finite or <= 0, using index-based fallback.")
}

x_seq <- seq(0, d_max, length.out = 200)

# ---- Prior draws ----
# Keep the original prior simulation exactly as before
n_prior <- 50
set.seed(1)
etasq_prior <- rexp(n_prior, rate = 2)
rhosq_prior <- rexp(n_prior, rate = 0.5)

# ---- Posterior draws ----
# Pull directly from post
etasq_all <- as.numeric(post$etasq_year)
rhosq_all <- as.numeric(post$rhosq_year)

# Drop non-finite values, just in case
ok_post <- is.finite(etasq_all) & is.finite(rhosq_all)
etasq_all <- etasq_all[ok_post]
rhosq_all <- rhosq_all[ok_post]

if (length(etasq_all) == 0 || length(rhosq_all) == 0) {
  stop("No valid posterior GP hyperparameter draws found in post$etasq_year / post$rhosq_year.")
}

# Subsample posterior curves for the cloud
# Keep the original logic exactly
n_post <- min(50, length(etasq_all))
set.seed(2)
idx_post <- sample(seq_along(etasq_all), size = n_post, replace = FALSE)
etasq_post <- etasq_all[idx_post]
rhosq_post <- rhosq_all[idx_post]

# ---- Mean curves: prior and posterior ----
# Keep original behavior:
# prior mean from all prior draws
# posterior mean from all posterior draws
prior_cov <- vapply(
  x_seq,
  FUN = function(x) mean(cov_fun(etasq_prior, rhosq_prior, x), na.rm = TRUE),
  FUN.VALUE = numeric(1)
)
prior_mean <- prior_cov

post_cov <- vapply(
  x_seq,
  FUN = function(x) mean(cov_fun(etasq_all, rhosq_all, x), na.rm = TRUE),
  FUN.VALUE = numeric(1)
)
post_mean <- post_cov

# y-axis upper bound
y_max <- max(
  cov_fun(etasq_prior, rhosq_prior, 0),
  cov_fun(etasq_all,  rhosq_all,  0),
  prior_mean,
  post_mean,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# ---------------------------------
# Styling choices
# ---------------------------------
col_prior_mean <- "black"
col_post_mean  <- "red"
lty_prior_mean <- 3
lty_post_mean  <- 2

col_prior_draw <- col_alpha("grey10", 0.18)
col_post_draw  <- col_alpha("firebrick", 0.25)

# ---------------------------------
# Reusable plotting function
# ---------------------------------
draw_year_cov_plot <- function() {
  plot(
    NULL,
    xlab = "distance (years)",
    ylab = "covariance",
    xlim = c(0, d_max-8),
    ylim = c(0, y_max*.9),
    main = "Year GP covariance: prior vs posterior"
  )

  # PRIOR curves
  for (i in seq_len(n_prior)) {
    curve(
      cov_fun(etasq_prior[i], rhosq_prior[i], x),
      from = 0, to = d_max,
      add = TRUE,
      col = col_prior_draw,
      lwd = 2
    )
  }

  # POSTERIOR curves
  for (i in seq_len(n_post)) {
    curve(
      cov_fun(etasq_post[i], rhosq_post[i], x),
      from = 0, to = d_max,
      add = TRUE,
      col = col_post_draw,
      lwd = 2
    )
  }

  # Mean lines
  lines(x_seq, prior_mean, col = col_prior_mean, lwd = 4, lty = lty_prior_mean)
  lines(x_seq, post_mean,  col = col_post_mean,  lwd = 4, lty = lty_post_mean)

  legend(
    "topright",
    legend = c("Prior draws", "Posterior draws", "Prior mean", "Posterior mean"),
    col    = c(col_prior_draw, col_post_draw, col_prior_mean, col_post_mean),
    lwd    = c(2, 2, 4, 4),
    lty    = c(1, 1, lty_prior_mean, lty_post_mean),
    bty    = "n"
  )
}

# ---------------------------------
# Save figure
# ---------------------------------
jpeg("../figs/year_covariance_gp_v1p8.jpeg", width = 2000, height = 1500, res = 220)
draw_year_cov_plot()
dev.off()

# ---------------------------------
# Also display inline
# ---------------------------------
draw_year_cov_plot()

```


```{r analyte persistence plot}
## ============================================================
## Analyte persistence: lag-1 correlation of latent year effect
## v1p8 (uses post$F_year: draws × Y × A)
## Ridgeline replacement (overwrites same filename pattern)
## ============================================================

F_arr <- post$F_year
stopifnot(length(dim(F_arr)) == 3)

n_draws <- dim(F_arr)[1]
Y_n     <- dim(F_arr)[2]
A_n     <- dim(F_arr)[3]

# compute lag-1 correlations for each analyte and draw
lag1_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_draws, ncol = A_n)

for (a in seq_len(A_n)) {
  Fa <- F_arr[, , a]  # draws × Y
  for (s in seq_len(n_draws)) {
    z <- Fa[s, ]
    if (is.finite(sd(z)) && sd(z) > 0) {
      lag1_mat[s, a] <- stats::cor(z[-Y_n], z[-1])
    }
  }
}

# ---- Build long posterior draw table (no forcats) ----
lag1_df <- as.data.frame(lag1_mat)
colnames(lag1_df) <- as.character(analyte_lookup$analyte_abbr)

lag1_long <- lag1_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "analyte_abbr",
    values_to = "lag1_cor"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(lag1_cor))

# order analytes by posterior mean lag-1 correlation
analyte_order <- lag1_long %>%
  group_by(analyte_abbr) %>%
  summarise(mu = mean(lag1_cor), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(mu) %>%
  pull(analyte_abbr)

lag1_long$analyte_abbr <- factor(lag1_long$analyte_abbr, levels = analyte_order)

# ---- Ridgeline plot ----
p_persist_ridge <- ggplot(lag1_long, aes(x = lag1_cor, y = analyte_abbr)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1) +
  stat_density_ridges(
    fill = "darkred",
    alpha = 0.55,
    scale = 1.1,
    rel_min_height = 0.01,
    quantile_lines = TRUE,
    quantiles = 2,
    quantile_color = "black",
    quantile_linetype = 2,
    quantile_linewidth = 1,
    bandwidth = 0.02
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Lag-1 correlation (F_year)",
    y = "Analyte (ordered by mean persistence)",
    title = "Analyte-specific persistence of temporal deviations"
  ) +
  theme_ridges(grid = TRUE, center_axis_labels = TRUE) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_persist_ridge

# Save to figs folder
ggsave(
  filename = "../figs/analyte_persistence_precis_v1p8.jpeg",
  plot = p_persist_ridge,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

```


```{r year effects plot}
## ============================================================
## Year effects plot: F_year by analyte (v1p8)
## post$F_year is draws × Y × A
## ============================================================

F_arr <- post$F_year
stopifnot(length(dim(F_arr)) == 3)

Y_n <- dim(F_arr)[2]
stopifnot(length(years_used) == Y_n)

A_n <- dim(F_arr)[3]

# posterior means and intervals for F_year
F_mean <- apply(F_arr, c(2, 3), mean, na.rm = TRUE)             # Y × A
F_hpdi <- apply(F_arr, c(2, 3), HPDI, prob = 0.89)              # 2 × Y × A

# Build long data frame
F_df <- expand.grid(
  Y = seq_len(Y_n),
  A = seq_len(A_n)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    effect_mean = as.vector(F_mean),          # length Y*A
    hpdi_low    = as.vector(F_hpdi[1, , ]),   # length Y*A
    hpdi_high   = as.vector(F_hpdi[2, , ])    # length Y*A
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(analyte_lookup, by = "A") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Year = years_used[Y])

gg_F <- ggplot(
  F_df,
  aes(x = Year, y = effect_mean, ymin = hpdi_low, ymax = hpdi_high)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = 2) +
  geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ analyte_abbr, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Latent temporal deviation (z concentration scale)",
    title = "Year-to-year latent deviations by analyte"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

gg_F

# Save to figs folder
ggsave(
  filename = "../figs/yearly_latent_deviations_v1p8.jpeg",
  plot = gg_F,
  width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300
)

```


## Annual Load Table and Plot

```{r pred data generation}
# ============================================================
# v1p8: Build a prediction frame that includes "missing chemistry years"
# Drop-in replacement with:
#   1) robust irrigation mapping (keeps S1/S2, avoids coercion warnings)
#   2) diagnostics explaining why years/rows get dropped
#   3) optional cin_z fill (default: NA cin_z -> 0)
#   4) fields: Crop + residue placeholder (RES_z)
#      - Crop is required for Stan (Cr index)
#      - Residue is required for Stan (RES predictor)
#        For now we set RES_z = 0 (placeholder; no impact)
#
# IMPORTANT v1p8 note:
#   - Irrigation is standardized later as irr_z to match the Stan data scale.
# ============================================================
build_d_pred <- function(
  wq_clean,
  event_id_col = "orig_row",
  keep_outflow_only = TRUE,
  drop_no_runoff = TRUE,
  cin_na_to_zero = TRUE,
  diagnostics = TRUE,
  res_na_to_zero = TRUE  # if RES_z ever exists, fill NA -> 0
) {

  # required columns
  needed <- c(
    "Year","Treatment","analyte_abbr","Season_STIR_toDate",
    "Rep","SampleMethod","FlumeMethod","Irrigation","Duplicate","cin_z",
    "Crop",
    event_id_col
  )
  miss <- setdiff(needed, names(wq_clean))
  if (length(miss) > 0) stop("wq_clean missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  d0 <- wq_clean

  if (diagnostics) {
    message("\n---- Year coverage in raw wq_clean (before any filters) ----")
    print(wq_clean %>% dplyr::count(Year) %>% dplyr::arrange(Year))
  }

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Filters (apply BEFORE transmute)
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  if (keep_outflow_only && "InflowOutflow" %in% names(d0)) {
    d0 <- d0 %>% dplyr::filter(.data$InflowOutflow == "OUT")
  }

  if (drop_no_runoff && "NoRunoff" %in% names(d0)) {
    d0 <- d0 %>% dplyr::filter(!isTRUE(.data$NoRunoff))
  }

  if (diagnostics) {
    message("\n---- Year coverage after keep_outflow_only / drop_no_runoff filters ----")
    print(d0 %>% dplyr::count(Year) %>% dplyr::arrange(Year))

    message("\n---- Years removed by filters (raw vs filtered) ----")
    raw_years  <- wq_clean %>% dplyr::distinct(Year)
    kept_years <- d0       %>% dplyr::distinct(Year)
    removed <- dplyr::anti_join(raw_years, kept_years, by = "Year") %>% dplyr::arrange(Year)
    print(removed)
  }

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Robust irrigation mapping (no "NAs introduced by coercion")
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  irr_levels <- sort(unique(as.character(d0$Irrigation)))

  irr_map <- tibble::tibble(Irrigation_chr = irr_levels) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      irr_num = dplyr::case_when(
        Irrigation_chr == "S1" ~ 11,
        Irrigation_chr == "S2" ~ 12,
        TRUE ~ readr::parse_number(Irrigation_chr)
      )
    )

  if (diagnostics) {
    bad_irr <- irr_map %>% dplyr::filter(is.na(irr_num))
    if (nrow(bad_irr) > 0) {
      message("Unmapped Irrigation levels (these rows will be dropped): ",
              paste(bad_irr$Irrigation_chr, collapse = ", "))
    } else {
      message("All Irrigation levels mapped successfully (including S1/S2 if present).")
    }
  }

  d1 <- d0 %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Irrigation_chr = as.character(Irrigation)) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(irr_map, by = "Irrigation_chr")

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Residue placeholder (Stan requires RES predictor)
  # Use an epsilon inside (0,1) as the boundary holder, never 0.
  # If a residue column exists, clamp it into (eps, 1-eps).
  # If missing entirely, create eps as a placeholder.
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  eps_res <- 1e-4

  clamp01 <- function(x, eps = 1e-4) {
    x <- as.numeric(x)
    x[!is.finite(x)] <- NA_real_
    pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  }

  if ("RES_z" %in% names(d1)) {
    d1 <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(RES_z = dplyr::if_else(is.na(RES_z), eps_res, clamp01(RES_z, eps_res)))
  } else if ("residue_z" %in% names(d1)) {
    d1 <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(RES_z = dplyr::if_else(is.na(.data$residue_z), eps_res, clamp01(.data$residue_z, eps_res)))
  } else if ("RES_input" %in% names(d1)) {
    d1 <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(RES_z = dplyr::if_else(is.na(.data$RES_input), eps_res, clamp01(.data$RES_input, eps_res)))
  } else if ("RES" %in% names(d1)) {
    d1 <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(RES_z = dplyr::if_else(is.na(.data$RES), eps_res, clamp01(.data$RES, eps_res)))
  } else if ("residue_prop" %in% names(d1)) {
    d1 <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(RES_z = dplyr::if_else(is.na(.data$residue_prop), eps_res, clamp01(.data$residue_prop, eps_res)))
  } else {
    d1 <- d1 %>% dplyr::mutate(RES_z = eps_res)
  }

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Diagnostics BEFORE final dropping
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  if (diagnostics) {

    na_irr_by_year <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        .by = Year,
        n = dplyr::n(),
        n_irr_na = sum(is.na(irr_num)),
        frac_irr_na = n_irr_na / n
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(frac_irr_na))

    message("\n---- Diagnostic: NA irr_num by Year (top 10) ----")
    print(utils::head(na_irr_by_year, 10))

    diag_by_year <- d1 %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        Year,
        na_event = is.na(.data[[event_id_col]]),
        na_stir  = is.na(Season_STIR_toDate),
        na_rep   = is.na(Rep),
        na_samp  = is.na(SampleMethod),
        na_flume = is.na(FlumeMethod),
        na_dup   = is.na(Duplicate),
        na_cin   = is.na(cin_z),
        na_crop  = is.na(Crop),
        na_res   = is.na(RES_z)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        .by = Year,
        n = dplyr::n(),
        frac_na_event = mean(na_event),
        frac_na_stir  = mean(na_stir),
        frac_na_rep   = mean(na_rep),
        frac_na_samp  = mean(na_samp),
        frac_na_flume = mean(na_flume),
        frac_na_dup   = mean(na_dup),
        frac_na_cin   = mean(na_cin),
        frac_na_crop  = mean(na_crop),
        frac_na_res   = mean(na_res)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(Year)

    message("\n---- Diagnostic: missing predictor fractions by Year ----")
    print(diag_by_year)
  }

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Build final d_pred with model-ready columns
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  d <- d1 %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      event_id = .data[[event_id_col]],
      Year,
      Treatment,
      analyte_abbr,
      Crop,
      STIR_raw = Season_STIR_toDate,
      Rep,
      SampleMethod,
      FlumeMethod,
      irr_num,
      dup   = as.numeric(Duplicate),
      cin_z = if (cin_na_to_zero) dplyr::if_else(is.na(cin_z), 0, cin_z) else cin_z,
      RES_z = if (res_na_to_zero) dplyr::if_else(is.na(RES_z), 0, RES_z) else RES_z
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(event_id),
      !is.na(Year),
      !is.na(Treatment),
      !is.na(analyte_abbr),
      !is.na(Crop),
      !is.na(STIR_raw),
      !is.na(Rep),
      !is.na(SampleMethod),
      !is.na(FlumeMethod),
      !is.na(irr_num),
      !is.na(dup),
      !is.na(cin_z),
      !is.na(RES_z)
    )

  if (diagnostics) {
    message("\n---- Final d_pred coverage by Year (after dropping incomplete rows) ----")
    print(d %>% dplyr::count(Year) %>% dplyr::arrange(Year))
  }

  d
}

# Run it
d_pred <- build_d_pred(wq_clean, event_id_col = "orig_row")

```


```{r real data generation}
make_annual_observed_table_all_treatments <- function(
  wq_clean,
  analyte_pick = NULL,
  keep_outflow_only = TRUE,
  drop_no_runoff = TRUE,
  B = 600,
  prob_ci = 0.95,
  seed = 1
) {
  needed <- c("Year","Treatment","analyte_abbr","Result_mg_L","Volume","orig_row")
  miss <- setdiff(needed, names(wq_clean))
  if (length(miss) > 0) stop("wq_clean missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  d0 <- wq_clean

  if (keep_outflow_only && "InflowOutflow" %in% names(d0)) {
    d0 <- d0 %>% dplyr::filter(.data$InflowOutflow == "OUT")
  }
  if (drop_no_runoff && "NoRunoff" %in% names(d0)) {
    d0 <- d0 %>% dplyr::filter(!isTRUE(.data$NoRunoff))
  }
  if (!is.null(analyte_pick)) {
    d0 <- d0 %>% dplyr::filter(as.character(.data$analyte_abbr) == analyte_pick)
  }

  # rows usable for observed load
  d_obs <- d0 %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$Result_mg_L), !is.na(.data$Volume)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Year = as.integer(.data$Year),
      analyte = as.character(.data$analyte_abbr),
      treatment = as.character(.data$Treatment),
      event_id = .data$orig_row,
      load_g = (.data$Result_mg_L * .data$Volume) / 1000,  # mg -> g
      vol_L  = .data$Volume
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Year, analyte, treatment, event_id, load_g, vol_L)

  q_lo <- (1 - prob_ci) / 2
  q_hi <- 1 - q_lo

  set.seed(seed)

  out <- d_obs %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data$Year, .data$analyte, .data$treatment) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~{
      dat <- dplyr::distinct(.x, .data$event_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
      n_events <- nrow(dat)

      if (n_events == 0) {
        return(tibble::tibble(
          load_mean = NA_real_, load_low = NA_real_, load_high = NA_real_,
          volume_mean = NA_real_, volume_low = NA_real_, volume_high = NA_real_,
          conc_mean = NA_real_, conc_low = NA_real_, conc_high = NA_real_,
          n_events = 0L,
          prob_ci = prob_ci
        ))
      }

      # point estimates (annual totals)
      L_sum <- sum(dat$load_g, na.rm = TRUE)
      V_sum <- sum(dat$vol_L,  na.rm = TRUE)
      C_fw  <- if (is.finite(V_sum) && V_sum > 0) (L_sum * 1000 / V_sum) else NA_real_

      # If only one event, bootstrap is degenerate, CI == point estimate
      if (n_events == 1 || B <= 1) {
        return(tibble::tibble(
          load_mean = L_sum, load_low = L_sum, load_high = L_sum,
          volume_mean = V_sum, volume_low = V_sum, volume_high = V_sum,
          conc_mean = C_fw, conc_low = C_fw, conc_high = C_fw,
          n_events = as.integer(n_events),
          prob_ci = prob_ci
        ))
      }

      # bootstrap indices: n_events x B matrix
      idx_mat <- matrix(
        sample.int(n_events, size = n_events * B, replace = TRUE),
        nrow = n_events, ncol = B
      )

      load_mat <- matrix(dat$load_g[idx_mat], nrow = n_events, ncol = B)
      vol_mat  <- matrix(dat$vol_L[idx_mat],  nrow = n_events, ncol = B)

      Lb <- colSums(load_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
      Vb <- colSums(vol_mat,  na.rm = TRUE)
      Cb <- ifelse(Vb > 0, (Lb * 1000 / Vb), NA_real_)

      tibble::tibble(
        load_mean = L_sum,
        load_low  = stats::quantile(Lb, probs = q_lo, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
        load_high = stats::quantile(Lb, probs = q_hi, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),

        volume_mean = V_sum,
        volume_low  = stats::quantile(Vb, probs = q_lo, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
        volume_high = stats::quantile(Vb, probs = q_hi, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),

        conc_mean = C_fw,
        conc_low  = stats::quantile(Cb, probs = q_lo, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
        conc_high = stats::quantile(Cb, probs = q_hi, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),

        n_events = as.integer(n_events),
        prob_ci = prob_ci
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  out
}

# Example:
annual_tbl_obs <- make_annual_observed_table_all_treatments(
  wq_clean = wq_clean,
  B = 600,
  prob_ci = 0.95
)

```


```{r pred data table}
# ============================================================
# v1p8: Annual table from posterior predictions summed over d_pred
# IMPORTANT FIXES:
#   - De-duplicate to ONE row per event_id for each Year × Treatment × Analyte group before summing
#   - Irrigation is used on standardized scale irr_z (matches Stan data)
#   - beta_irr is analyte-specific in v1p8: post$beta_irr[draw, A]
# ============================================================
make_annual_load_table_all_treatments_pred <- function(
  post,
  d_pred,
  years_used,
  analyte_lookup,
  block_lookup,
  sampler_lookup,
  flume_lookup,
  crop_lookup,
  c_stats,
  V_mean, V_sd,
  stir_mean, stir_sd,
  irr_mean, irr_sd,             # NEW v1p8
  n_draws = 1500,
  prob_ci = 0.95,
  drop_unmapped_analytes = TRUE,
  drop_missing_c_stats = TRUE
) {
  needed_cols <- c(
    "event_id","Year","Treatment","analyte_abbr","STIR_raw",
    "Rep","SampleMethod","FlumeMethod","irr_num","dup","cin_z",
    "Crop","RES_z"
  )
  miss <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(d_pred))
  if (length(miss) > 0) stop("d_pred is missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  # draw subsample
  n_total <- nrow(post$alpha)
  draw_idx <- if (n_total > n_draws) sample.int(n_total, n_draws) else seq_len(n_total)
  D <- length(draw_idx)

  q_lo <- (1 - prob_ci) / 2
  q_hi <- 1 - q_lo
  ci <- function(x) stats::quantile(x, probs = c(q_lo, q_hi), na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)

  # map indices + stats
  dat <- d_pred %>%
    dplyr::left_join(analyte_lookup %>% dplyr::select(A, analyte_abbr), by = "analyte_abbr") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(block_lookup   %>% dplyr::select(B, Rep),          by = "Rep") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(sampler_lookup %>% dplyr::select(S, SampleMethod), by = "SampleMethod") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(flume_lookup   %>% dplyr::select(Fu, FlumeMethod), by = "FlumeMethod") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(crop_lookup    %>% dplyr::select(Cr, Crop),        by = "Crop") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(c_stats %>% dplyr::select(A, c_mean, c_sd) %>% dplyr::distinct(), by = "A") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Y      = match(Year, years_used),
      STIR_z = (STIR_raw - stir_mean) / stir_sd,
      irr_z  = (irr_num  - irr_mean)  / irr_sd     # NEW v1p8
    )

  # ---- drop unmapped analytes instead of stopping ----
  if (anyNA(dat$A)) {
    bad_an <- sort(unique(dat$analyte_abbr[is.na(dat$A)]))
    msg <- paste0(
      "Some analyte_abbr not found in analyte_lookup: ",
      paste(bad_an, collapse = ", "),
      "."
    )
    if (!isTRUE(drop_unmapped_analytes)) {
      stop(msg)
    } else {
      warning(msg, " Dropping these rows from d_pred for annual table.")
      dat <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(A))
    }
  }

  # ---- optionally drop rows missing c_stats ----
  if (anyNA(dat$c_mean) || anyNA(dat$c_sd)) {
    bad_an2 <- sort(unique(dat$analyte_abbr[is.na(dat$c_mean) | is.na(dat$c_sd)]))
    msg2 <- paste0(
      "Missing c_stats (c_mean/c_sd) for some analytes: ",
      paste(bad_an2, collapse = ", "),
      "."
    )
    if (!isTRUE(drop_missing_c_stats)) {
      stop(msg2)
    } else {
      warning(msg2, " Dropping these rows from d_pred for annual table.")
      dat <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(c_mean), !is.na(c_sd))
    }
  }

  # Hard checks for structural lookups (these *should* be complete)
  if (anyNA(dat$B))  stop("Some Rep not found in block_lookup.")
  if (anyNA(dat$S))  stop("Some SampleMethod not found in sampler_lookup.")
  if (anyNA(dat$Fu)) stop("Some FlumeMethod not found in flume_lookup.")
  if (anyNA(dat$Cr)) stop("Some Crop not found in crop_lookup.")
  if (anyNA(dat$Y))  stop("Some Year not found in years_used.")
  if (anyNA(dat$irr_z)) stop("Some irr_z are NA. Check irr_mean/irr_sd and irr_num mapping.")

  # Integer indices for fast indexing
  dat <- dat %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      A  = as.integer(A),
      B  = as.integer(B),
      S  = as.integer(S),
      Fu = as.integer(Fu),
      Y  = as.integer(Y),
      Cr = as.integer(Cr)
    )

  # Groups: all treatments automatically
  groups <- dat %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Year, analyte_abbr, Treatment) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(analyte_abbr, Year, Treatment)

  out <- vector("list", nrow(groups))

  for (g in seq_len(nrow(groups))) {

    yr <- groups$Year[g]
    an <- groups$analyte_abbr[g]
    tr <- groups$Treatment[g]

    dsub <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(Year == yr, analyte_abbr == an, Treatment == tr)
    if (nrow(dsub) == 0) next

    # de-duplicate analyte rows to one per event_id
    dsub1 <- dsub %>% dplyr::distinct(event_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

    # Row-level predictors (use dsub1)
    A  <- dsub1$A;  B <- dsub1$B;  S <- dsub1$S;  Fu <- dsub1$Fu;  Y <- dsub1$Y;  Cr <- dsub1$Cr
    stz <- dsub1$STIR_z
    cin <- dsub1$cin_z
    irz <- dsub1$irr_z              # NEW v1p8
    dup <- dsub1$dup
    res <- dsub1$RES_z
    c_mean <- dsub1$c_mean
    c_sd   <- dsub1$c_sd

    # Event-level ledger for volumes (also 1 row per event_id)
    ev <- dsub %>%
      dplyr::distinct(event_id, Year, Treatment, STIR_z, Crop, RES_z, Rep, SampleMethod, FlumeMethod, irr_num, irr_z, dup) %>%
      dplyr::left_join(crop_lookup    %>% dplyr::select(Cr, Crop),        by = "Crop") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(block_lookup   %>% dplyr::select(B, Rep),          by = "Rep") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(sampler_lookup %>% dplyr::select(S, SampleMethod), by = "SampleMethod") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(flume_lookup   %>% dplyr::select(Fu, FlumeMethod), by = "FlumeMethod") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Cr = as.integer(Cr),
        B  = as.integer(B),
        S  = as.integer(S),
        Fu = as.integer(Fu)
      )

    stz_ev <- ev$STIR_z
    res_ev <- ev$RES_z
    Cr_ev  <- ev$Cr

    V_ann   <- numeric(D)
    L_ann_g <- numeric(D)
    C_fw    <- numeric(D)

    for (dd in seq_len(D)) {
      s <- draw_idx[dd]

      # ---- Predict volume per event (one per event_id) ----
      muV_z_ev <- post$a_V[s] +
        post$b_V[s]        * stz_ev +
        post$beta_res_V[s] * res_ev +
        post$gamma_Cr_V[s, Cr_ev]

      # Post-process volume predictions onto the physically admissible domain.
      V_ev_raw <- clamp_nonnegative(V_mean + V_sd * muV_z_ev)
      Vsum <- sum(V_ev_raw, na.rm = TRUE)

      # ---- Predict concentration per analyte event-row (one per event_id) ----
      muV_z_row <- post$a_V[s] +
        post$b_V[s]        * stz +
        post$beta_res_V[s] * res +
        post$gamma_Cr_V[s, Cr]

      gB <- post$gamma_B[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, B)]
      gS <- post$gamma_S[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, S)]
      gF <- post$gamma_F[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, Fu)]
      kY <- post$F_year[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(Y, A)]
      gCrC <- post$gamma_Cr[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, Cr)]

      muC_z <- post$alpha[s, A] +
        post$beta_stir[s, A]  * stz +
        post$beta_cin[s, A]   * cin +
        post$beta_vol[s]      * muV_z_row +
        post$beta_irr[s, A]   * irz +      # NEW v1p8: analyte-specific and standardized
        post$beta_dup[s, A]   * dup +
        post$beta_res_C[s, A] * res +
        gCrC +
        gB + gS + gF + kY

      # Post-process concentration predictions onto the physically admissible
      # domain before computing annual summaries and loads.
      C_raw <- clamp_nonnegative(c_mean + c_sd * muC_z)

      # ---- Annual load for this analyte: sum across events ONCE ----
      V_row_raw <- clamp_nonnegative(V_mean + V_sd * muV_z_row)
      Lmg <- sum(C_raw * V_row_raw, na.rm = TRUE)
      Lg  <- Lmg / 1000

      V_ann[dd]   <- Vsum
      L_ann_g[dd] <- Lg
      C_fw[dd]    <- if (is.finite(Vsum) && Vsum > 0) ((Lg * 1000) / Vsum) else NA_real_
    }

    out[[g]] <- tibble::tibble(
      Year = yr,
      analyte = an,
      treatment = tr,
      volume_mean   = clamp_nonnegative(mean(V_ann,   na.rm = TRUE)),
      volume_low    = clamp_nonnegative(ci(V_ann)[1]),
      volume_high   = clamp_nonnegative(ci(V_ann)[2]),
      conc_mean     = clamp_nonnegative(mean(C_fw,    na.rm = TRUE)),
      conc_low      = clamp_nonnegative(ci(C_fw)[1]),
      conc_high     = clamp_nonnegative(ci(C_fw)[2]),
      load_mean     = clamp_nonnegative(mean(L_ann_g, na.rm = TRUE)),
      load_low      = clamp_nonnegative(ci(L_ann_g)[1]),
      load_high     = clamp_nonnegative(ci(L_ann_g)[2]),
      n_events      = nrow(ev),
      n_rows        = nrow(dsub1),
      prob_ci       = prob_ci
    )
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(analyte, Year, treatment)
}

# Example usage:
annual_tbl_pred <- make_annual_load_table_all_treatments_pred(
  post = post,
  d_pred = d_pred,
  years_used = years_used,
  analyte_lookup = analyte_lookup,
  block_lookup = block_lookup,
  sampler_lookup = sampler_lookup,
  flume_lookup = flume_lookup,
  crop_lookup = crop_lookup,
  c_stats = c_stats,
  V_mean = V_mean, V_sd = V_sd,
  stir_mean = stir_mean, stir_sd = stir_sd,
  irr_mean = irr_mean, irr_sd = irr_sd
)

```


```{r bind obs and modeled}
bind_observed_modeled <- function(annual_tbl_pred, annual_tbl_obs) {

  # ----------------------------
  # Helper: normalize CI columns to *_low95/*_high95
  # ----------------------------
  normalize_ci <- function(df, prefix, source_label) {

    mean_nm <- paste0(prefix, "_mean")
    low95_nm  <- paste0(prefix, "_low95")
    high95_nm <- paste0(prefix, "_high95")
    low_nm    <- paste0(prefix, "_low")
    high_nm   <- paste0(prefix, "_high")

    if (all(c(mean_nm, low95_nm, high95_nm) %in% names(df))) return(df)

    if (all(c(mean_nm, low_nm, high_nm) %in% names(df))) {
      df[[low95_nm]]  <- df[[low_nm]]
      df[[high95_nm]] <- df[[high_nm]]
      return(df)
    }

    stop(
      sprintf(
        "%s table is missing CI columns for '%s'. Expected either (%s,%s,%s) or (%s,%s,%s). Present: %s",
        source_label, prefix,
        mean_nm, low95_nm, high95_nm,
        mean_nm, low_nm, high_nm,
        paste(names(df), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  # ---- normalize both inputs ----
  annual_tbl_pred <- normalize_ci(annual_tbl_pred, "load",   "Modeled")
  annual_tbl_pred <- normalize_ci(annual_tbl_pred, "conc",   "Modeled")
  annual_tbl_pred <- normalize_ci(annual_tbl_pred, "volume", "Modeled")

  annual_tbl_obs  <- normalize_ci(annual_tbl_obs,  "load",   "Observed")
  annual_tbl_obs  <- normalize_ci(annual_tbl_obs,  "conc",   "Observed")
  annual_tbl_obs  <- normalize_ci(annual_tbl_obs,  "volume", "Observed")

  # ----------------------------
  # Build n safely (non-vectorized column-existence checks)
  # ----------------------------
  if ("n_events" %in% names(annual_tbl_pred)) {
    annual_tbl_pred$n <- annual_tbl_pred$n_events
  } else if ("n_rows" %in% names(annual_tbl_pred)) {
    annual_tbl_pred$n <- annual_tbl_pred$n_rows
  } else {
    annual_tbl_pred$n <- NA_integer_
  }

  if ("n_events" %in% names(annual_tbl_obs)) {
    annual_tbl_obs$n <- annual_tbl_obs$n_events
  } else if ("n_rows" %in% names(annual_tbl_obs)) {
    annual_tbl_obs$n <- annual_tbl_obs$n_rows
  } else {
    annual_tbl_obs$n <- NA_integer_
  }

  # ---- modeled ----
  mod <- annual_tbl_pred %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Year      = as.integer(Year),
      analyte   = as.character(analyte),
      treatment = as.character(treatment),
      source    = "Modeled",

      load_mean,   load_low95,   load_high95,
      conc_mean,   conc_low95,   conc_high95,
      volume_mean, volume_low95, volume_high95,

      n = as.integer(n)
    )

  # ---- observed ----
  obs <- annual_tbl_obs %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Year      = as.integer(Year),
      analyte   = as.character(analyte),
      treatment = as.character(treatment),
      source    = "Observed",

      load_mean,   load_low95,   load_high95,
      conc_mean,   conc_low95,   conc_high95,
      volume_mean, volume_low95, volume_high95,

      n = as.integer(n)
    )

  dplyr::bind_rows(mod, obs) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("CT","MT","ST")),
      source    = factor(source, levels = c("Modeled","Observed"))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(analyte, Year, treatment, source)
}

# Combine modeled and observed annual tables
annual_both <- bind_observed_modeled(annual_tbl_pred, annual_tbl_obs)

```


```{r plot obs and mod}
plot_annual_by_treatment_obs_vs_mod <- function(
  annual_both,
  analyte_pick,
  metric = c("load","conc","volume"),
  dodge = 0.20
) {
  metric <- match.arg(metric)

  y_mean <- paste0(metric, "_mean")
  y_low  <- paste0(metric, "_low95")
  y_high <- paste0(metric, "_high95")

  stopifnot(all(c("Year","analyte","treatment","source", y_mean, y_low, y_high) %in% names(annual_both)))

  d <- annual_both %>%
    dplyr::filter(as.character(analyte) == analyte_pick) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Year = as.integer(Year),
      treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("CT","MT","ST")),
      source = factor(source, levels = c("Modeled","Observed"))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(Year, treatment, source)

  if (nrow(d) == 0) stop("No rows found for analyte = '", analyte_pick, "'.")

  ylab <- switch(
    metric,
    "load"   = "Annual load (g)",
    "conc"   = "Flow-weighted concentration (mg/L)",
    "volume" = "Annual volume (L)"
  )

  pd <- ggplot2::position_dodge(width = dodge)

  trt_cols <- c(
    CT = "#1f77b4",
    MT = "#ff7f0e",
    ST = "#2ca02c"
  )

  # Split for cleaner layering
  d_mod <- d %>% dplyr::filter(source == "Modeled")
  d_obs <- d %>% dplyr::filter(source == "Observed")

  ggplot2::ggplot() +
    # --- Modeled uncertainty (linerange) ---
    ggplot2::geom_linerange(
      data = d_mod,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = Year,
        ymin = .data[[y_low]],
        ymax = .data[[y_high]],
        color = treatment
      ),
      position = pd,
      linewidth = 1.6,
      alpha = 0.45,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +

    # --- Modeled line ---
    ggplot2::geom_line(
      data = d_mod,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = Year,
        y = .data[[y_mean]],
        color = treatment,
        group = treatment
      ),
      position = pd,
      linewidth = 1.2,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +

    # --- Modeled points: filled with treatment color, black outline ---
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = d_mod,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = Year,
        y = .data[[y_mean]],
        fill = treatment,
        shape = source              # NEW: adds "Modeled vs Observed" legend without changing appearance
      ),
      position = pd,
      #shape = 21,
      size = 3.4,
      stroke = 0.9,
      color = "black"
    ) +

    # --- Observed uncertainty (linerange) ---
    ggplot2::geom_linerange(
      data = d_obs,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = Year,
        ymin = .data[[y_low]],
        ymax = .data[[y_high]],
        color = treatment
      ),
      position = pd,
      linewidth = 1.2,
      alpha = 0.35,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +

    # --- Observed points: white fill, treatment-colored outline ---
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = d_obs,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = Year,
        y = .data[[y_mean]],
        color = treatment,
        shape = source              # NEW
      ),
      position = pd,
      #shape = 21,
      fill = "white",
      size = 2.8,
      stroke = 1.2
    ) +

    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = trt_cols, name = "Treatment") +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = trt_cols, guide = "none") +

    # NEW: keep shapes identical in the plot, but create a legend for source
    ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
      values = c(Modeled = 21, Observed = 21),
      name = "Estimate type",
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(
      shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
          fill  = c("black", "white"),
          color = c("black", "black"),
          stroke = c(0.9, 1.2),
          size = c(3.4, 2.8)
        )
      )
    ) +

    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = sort(unique(d$Year)),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Year",
      y = ylab,
      title = paste0(analyte_pick, ": annual ", metric, " by treatment")
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank()
    )
}

```

```{r execute plot both}
# Example usage:
plot_annual_by_treatment_obs_vs_mod(annual_both, analyte_pick = "NH4", metric = "load")
```

```{r save all plots}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save images (v1p8)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sanitize_slug <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[[:space:]]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9_]+", "", x)
  x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("^_|_$", "", x)
  x
}

save_all_analyte_obs_vs_mod_plots <- function(
  annual_both,
  metric = c("load","conc","volume"),
  out_dir = file.path("../figs", "annual_obs_vs_modeled_v1p8"),
  width = 9,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300,
  device = "jpg"
) {
  metric <- match.arg(metric)
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  analytes <- sort(unique(as.character(annual_both$analyte)))

  log <- vector("list", length(analytes))

  for (i in seq_along(analytes)) {
    a <- analytes[i]
    slug <- sanitize_slug(a)

    p <- try(
      plot_annual_by_treatment_obs_vs_mod(
        annual_both = annual_both,
        analyte_pick = a,
        metric = metric
      ),
      silent = TRUE
    )

    if (inherits(p, "try-error")) {
      log[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
        analyte = a,
        saved = FALSE,
        file = NA_character_,
        error = as.character(p)
      )
      next
    }

    fname <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("annual_", metric, "_", slug, "_obs_vs_modeled_v1p8.", device))

    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fname,
      plot = p,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      dpi = dpi,
      device = device
    )

    log[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
      analyte = a,
      saved = TRUE,
      file = fname,
      error = NA_character_
    )
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(log)
}

# Example:
log_load <- save_all_analyte_obs_vs_mod_plots(annual_both, metric = "load")
# log_conc <- save_all_analyte_obs_vs_mod_plots(annual_both, metric = "conc")
# log_vol  <- save_all_analyte_obs_vs_mod_plots(annual_both, metric = "volume")

```

```{r annual-volume-obs-vs-modeled-plot}
# ============================================================
# Annual runoff volume by treatment: Observed vs Bayes Modeled
# Uses the same visual design as your load plots
# Converts to kiloliters (kL) for more manageable y-axis values
# ============================================================

stopifnot(exists("annual_combined_out") || exists("annual_both"))

# Prefer annual_combined_out from your export chunk (it is standardized)
vol_src <- if (exists("annual_combined_out")) annual_combined_out else annual_both

# Keep only the two sources we need (handle either naming convention)
vol_src <- vol_src %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    source = dplyr::case_when(
      source %in% c("Bayes_Modeled", "Modeled") ~ "Modeled",
      source %in% c("Observed")                 ~ "Observed",
      TRUE ~ as.character(source)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(source %in% c("Modeled","Observed")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Year = as.integer(Year),
    treatment = factor(as.character(treatment), levels = c("CT","MT","ST")),
    source = factor(as.character(source), levels = c("Modeled","Observed"))
  )

# Volume is duplicated across analytes in your annual tables, so collapse safely.
# If it's truly identical across analytes, mean() will preserve it.
vol_annual <- vol_src %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Year, treatment, source) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    volume_mean   = mean(volume_mean,   na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    volume_low95  = mean(volume_low95,  na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    volume_high95 = mean(volume_high95, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Year, treatment, source) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    volume_low  = volume_low95,
    volume_high = volume_high95
  )

if (nrow(vol_annual) == 0) stop("No annual volume rows found after filtering sources.")

# Split for cleaner layering (same as your load plot function)
d_mod <- vol_annual %>% dplyr::filter(source == "Modeled")
d_obs <- vol_annual %>% dplyr::filter(source == "Observed")

pd <- ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.20)

trt_cols <- c(
  CT = "#1f77b4",
  MT = "#ff7f0e",
  ST = "#2ca02c"
)

p_vol <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
  # Modeled uncertainty
  ggplot2::geom_linerange(
    data = d_mod,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Year, ymin = volume_low, ymax = volume_high, color = treatment),
    position = pd,
    linewidth = 1.6,
    alpha = 0.45,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # Modeled line
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    data = d_mod,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Year, y = volume_mean, color = treatment, group = treatment),
    position = pd,
    linewidth = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  # Modeled points (filled, black outline) + legend mapping
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = d_mod,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Year, y = volume_mean, fill = treatment, shape = source),
    position = pd,
    size = 3.4,
    stroke = 0.9,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  # Observed uncertainty
  ggplot2::geom_linerange(
    data = d_obs,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Year, ymin = volume_low, ymax = volume_high, color = treatment),
    position = pd,
    linewidth = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.35,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # Observed points (open, treatment outline) + legend mapping
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = d_obs,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Year, y = volume_mean, color = treatment, shape = source),
    position = pd,
    fill = "white",
    size = 2.8,
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = trt_cols, name = "Treatment") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = trt_cols, guide = "none") +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(Modeled = 21, Observed = 21),
    name = "Estimate type",
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(
    shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        fill   = c("black", "white"),
        color  = c("black", "black"),
        stroke = c(0.9, 1.2),
        size   = c(3.4, 2.8)
      )
    )
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(vol_annual$Year)),
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Annual runoff volume (kL)",
    title = "Annual runoff volume by treatment"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank()
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save volume plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

fig_dir <- file.path("../figs", paste0("annual_volume_", model_version))
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

fig_file <- file.path(
  "../figs",
  paste0("annual_volume_obs_vs_modeled_", model_version, ".jpg")
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = fig_file,
  plot = p_vol,
  width = 9,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)

message("[OK] Wrote: ", fig_file)
p_vol
```

```{r export-annual-volume-wide-csv}
# ============================================================
# Export annual volume summary (Modeled + optional Observed)
# Row = Year
# Columns = CT/MT/ST with mean/low/high
# Also writes a publication-ready version: "mean (low, high)"
# Units: kL (converted from L by /1000)
# ============================================================

stopifnot(exists("annual_combined_out") || exists("annual_both"))
stopifnot(exists("model_version"))

vol_src <- if (exists("annual_combined_out")) annual_combined_out else annual_both

vol_src <- vol_src %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    source = dplyr::case_when(
      source %in% c("Bayes_Modeled", "Modeled") ~ "Modeled",
      source %in% c("Observed")                 ~ "Observed",
      TRUE ~ as.character(source)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(source %in% c("Modeled","Observed")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Year = as.integer(Year),
    treatment = factor(as.character(treatment), levels = c("CT","MT","ST")),
    source = factor(as.character(source), levels = c("Modeled","Observed"))
  )

# Collapse across analytes (volume repeats per analyte)
vol_annual <- vol_src %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Year, treatment, source) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    volume_mean = mean(volume_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    volume_low  = mean(volume_low95,  na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    volume_high = mean(volume_high95, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

out_dir <- "../out"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---------- (A) Modeled wide export ----------
vol_modeled_wide <- vol_annual %>%
  dplyr::filter(source == "Modeled") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(col = paste0(as.character(treatment), "_mod")) %>%
  dplyr::select(Year, col, volume_mean, volume_low, volume_high) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = col,
    values_from = c(volume_mean, volume_low, volume_high),
    names_glue  = "{col}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename_with(~ gsub("_volume_", "_volume_kL_", .x, fixed = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Year)

# ----- Add Total row (sum across years) -----
vol_modeled_wide <- vol_modeled_wide %>% dplyr::mutate(Year = as.character(Year))

vol_modeled_total <- vol_modeled_wide %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Year = "Total",
    dplyr::across(-Year, ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE))
  )

vol_modeled_wide <- dplyr::bind_rows(vol_modeled_wide, vol_modeled_total)

f_modeled <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("annual_volume_kL_wide_modeled_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(vol_modeled_wide, f_modeled)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", f_modeled)

# ---------- (B) Pub-ready modeled export ----------
fmt_ci <- function(mean, low, high, digits = 0) {
  ifelse(
    is.finite(mean) & is.finite(low) & is.finite(high),
    paste0(
      formatC(mean, format = "f", digits = digits),
      " (",
      formatC(low,  format = "f", digits = digits),
      ", ",
      formatC(high, format = "f", digits = digits),
      ")"
    ),
    NA_character_
  )
}

vol_modeled_pub <- vol_modeled_wide %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Year,
    CT = fmt_ci(CT_mod_volume_kL_mean, CT_mod_volume_kL_low, CT_mod_volume_kL_high, digits = 0),
    MT = fmt_ci(MT_mod_volume_kL_mean, MT_mod_volume_kL_low, MT_mod_volume_kL_high, digits = 0),
    ST = fmt_ci(ST_mod_volume_kL_mean, ST_mod_volume_kL_low, ST_mod_volume_kL_high, digits = 0)
  )

# ----- Add Total row to pub table -----
vol_modeled_pub_total <- vol_modeled_wide %>%
  dplyr::filter(Year == "Total") %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Year = "Total",
    CT = fmt_ci(CT_mod_volume_kL_mean,
                CT_mod_volume_kL_low,
                CT_mod_volume_kL_high,
                digits = 0),
    MT = fmt_ci(MT_mod_volume_kL_mean,
                MT_mod_volume_kL_low,
                MT_mod_volume_kL_high,
                digits = 0),
    ST = fmt_ci(ST_mod_volume_kL_mean,
                ST_mod_volume_kL_low,
                ST_mod_volume_kL_high,
                digits = 0)
  )

vol_modeled_pub <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  vol_modeled_pub,
  vol_modeled_pub_total
)

f_modeled_pub <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("annual_volume_kL_wide_modeled_pub_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(vol_modeled_pub, f_modeled_pub)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", f_modeled_pub)

# ---------- Optional: Observed wide export too ----------
vol_observed_wide <- vol_annual %>%
  dplyr::filter(source == "Observed") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(col = paste0(as.character(treatment), "_obs")) %>%
  dplyr::select(Year, col, volume_mean, volume_low, volume_high) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = col,
    values_from = c(volume_mean, volume_low, volume_high),
    names_glue  = "{col}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename_with(~ gsub("_volume_", "_volume_kL_", .x, fixed = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Year)

f_obs <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("annual_volume_kL_wide_observed_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(vol_observed_wide, f_obs)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", f_obs)

vol_observed_pub <- vol_observed_wide %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Year,
    CT = fmt_ci(CT_obs_volume_kL_mean, CT_obs_volume_kL_low, CT_obs_volume_kL_high, digits = 0),
    MT = fmt_ci(MT_obs_volume_kL_mean, MT_obs_volume_kL_low, MT_obs_volume_kL_high, digits = 0),
    ST = fmt_ci(ST_obs_volume_kL_mean, ST_obs_volume_kL_low, ST_obs_volume_kL_high, digits = 0)
  )

f_obs_pub <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("annual_volume_kL_wide_observed_pub_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(vol_observed_pub, f_obs_pub)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", f_obs_pub)

# Print the modeled pub-ready table in the Rmd
vol_modeled_pub

```


```{r export bayes annual predictions}
# ============================================================
# v1p8: Export annual posterior predictions (and optional observed)
# ============================================================

export_dir <- "../out"
dir.create(export_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---- 1) Annual posterior summary (Modeled) ----
annual_pred_out <- annual_tbl_pred %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model_version = model_version,
    source = "Bayes_Modeled",
    interval_prob = dplyr::coalesce(prob_ci, 0.95)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    model_version, source, interval_prob,
    Year, analyte, treatment,
    n_events, n_rows,
    volume_mean, volume_low, volume_high,
    conc_mean,   conc_low,   conc_high,
    load_mean,   load_low,   load_high
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(analyte, Year, treatment)

pred_file <- file.path(export_dir, paste0("annual_load_summary_bayes_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(annual_pred_out, pred_file)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", pred_file)

# ---- 2) Observed annual summary in same schema ----
pick_ci_cols <- function(df, prefix) {
  mean_nm  <- paste0(prefix, "_mean")
  low95_nm <- paste0(prefix, "_low95")
  high95_nm <- paste0(prefix, "_high95")
  low_nm   <- paste0(prefix, "_low")
  high_nm  <- paste0(prefix, "_high")

  if (all(c(mean_nm, low95_nm, high95_nm) %in% names(df))) {
    list(mean = mean_nm, low = low95_nm, high = high95_nm)
  } else if (all(c(mean_nm, low_nm, high_nm) %in% names(df))) {
    list(mean = mean_nm, low = low_nm, high = high_nm)
  } else {
    stop(
      sprintf(
        "Observed table missing CI columns for '%s'. Need (%s,%s,%s) or (%s,%s,%s). Present: %s",
        prefix,
        mean_nm, low95_nm, high95_nm,
        mean_nm, low_nm, high_nm,
        paste(names(df), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }
}

vol_cols  <- pick_ci_cols(annual_tbl_obs, "volume")
conc_cols <- pick_ci_cols(annual_tbl_obs, "conc")
load_cols <- pick_ci_cols(annual_tbl_obs, "load")

annual_obs_out <- annual_tbl_obs %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model_version = model_version,
    source = "Observed",
    interval_prob = if ("prob_ci" %in% names(.)) dplyr::coalesce(prob_ci, 0.95) else 0.95
  ) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    model_version, source, interval_prob,
    Year,
    analyte   = as.character(analyte),
    treatment = as.character(treatment),
    n_events,
    n_rows = NA_integer_,

    volume_mean = .data[[vol_cols$mean]],
    volume_low  = .data[[vol_cols$low]],
    volume_high = .data[[vol_cols$high]],

    conc_mean = .data[[conc_cols$mean]],
    conc_low  = .data[[conc_cols$low]],
    conc_high = .data[[conc_cols$high]],

    load_mean = .data[[load_cols$mean]],
    load_low  = .data[[load_cols$low]],
    load_high = .data[[load_cols$high]]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(analyte, Year, treatment)

# ---- 3) Combined (Modeled + Observed) ----
annual_combined_out <- dplyr::bind_rows(annual_pred_out, annual_obs_out) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(source, analyte, Year, treatment)

comb_file <- file.path(export_dir, paste0("annual_load_summary_bayes_plus_observed_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(annual_combined_out, comb_file)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", comb_file)

# ---- 4) Optional: per-draw export (for Python fan charts / method-comparison) ----
export_annual_draws <- function(
  post,
  d_pred,
  years_used,
  analyte_lookup,
  block_lookup,
  sampler_lookup,
  flume_lookup,
  crop_lookup,
  c_stats,
  V_mean, V_sd,
  stir_mean, stir_sd,
  irr_mean, irr_sd,            # NEW v1p8
  n_draws = 400,
  seed = 1,
  drop_unmapped_analytes = TRUE,
  drop_missing_c_stats = TRUE,
  drop_unmapped_years = FALSE,
  drop_unmapped_other = FALSE
) {
  needed_cols <- c(
    "event_id","Year","Treatment","analyte_abbr","STIR_raw",
    "Rep","SampleMethod","FlumeMethod","irr_num","dup","cin_z",
    "Crop","RES_z"
  )
  miss <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(d_pred))
  if (length(miss) > 0) stop("d_pred is missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  set.seed(seed)

  # draw subsample
  n_total <- nrow(post$alpha)
  draw_idx <- if (n_total > n_draws) sample.int(n_total, n_draws) else seq_len(n_total)
  D <- length(draw_idx)

  # map indices + stats
  dat <- d_pred %>%
    dplyr::left_join(analyte_lookup %>% dplyr::select(A, analyte_abbr), by = "analyte_abbr") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(block_lookup   %>% dplyr::select(B, Rep),          by = "Rep") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(sampler_lookup %>% dplyr::select(S, SampleMethod), by = "SampleMethod") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(flume_lookup   %>% dplyr::select(Fu, FlumeMethod), by = "FlumeMethod") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(crop_lookup    %>% dplyr::select(Cr, Crop),        by = "Crop") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(c_stats %>% dplyr::select(A, c_mean, c_sd) %>% dplyr::distinct(), by = "A") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Y      = match(Year, years_used),
      STIR_z = (STIR_raw - stir_mean) / stir_sd,
      irr_z  = (irr_num  - irr_mean)  / irr_sd     # NEW v1p8
    )

  # ---- Diagnose + optionally drop unmapped analytes ----
  if (anyNA(dat$A)) {
    bad_an <- sort(unique(dat$analyte_abbr[is.na(dat$A)]))
    msg <- paste0(
      "Unmapped analyte_abbr (not in analyte_lookup): ",
      paste(bad_an, collapse = ", "), "."
    )
    if (!isTRUE(drop_unmapped_analytes)) stop(msg)
    warning(msg, " Dropping these rows from d_pred for per-draw export.")
    dat <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(A))
  }

  # ---- Diagnose + optionally drop missing c_stats ----
  if (anyNA(dat$c_mean) || anyNA(dat$c_sd)) {
    bad_an2 <- sort(unique(dat$analyte_abbr[is.na(dat$c_mean) | is.na(dat$c_sd)]))
    msg2 <- paste0(
      "Missing c_stats (c_mean/c_sd) for analytes: ",
      paste(bad_an2, collapse = ", "), "."
    )
    if (!isTRUE(drop_missing_c_stats)) stop(msg2)
    warning(msg2, " Dropping these rows from d_pred for per-draw export.")
    dat <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(c_mean), !is.na(c_sd))
  }

  # ---- Years_used mismatch (optional drop) ----
  if (anyNA(dat$Y)) {
    bad_y <- sort(unique(dat$Year[is.na(dat$Y)]))
    msgy <- paste0("Some Year not found in years_used: ", paste(bad_y, collapse = ", "), ".")
    if (!isTRUE(drop_unmapped_years)) stop(msgy)
    warning(msgy, " Dropping these rows from d_pred for per-draw export.")
    dat <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(Y))
  }

  # ---- Other lookups (optional drop; default: strict) ----
  if (anyNA(dat$B) || anyNA(dat$S) || anyNA(dat$Fu) || anyNA(dat$Cr)) {
    parts <- c()
    if (anyNA(dat$B))  parts <- c(parts, paste0("Rep: ", paste(sort(unique(dat$Rep[is.na(dat$B)])), collapse = ", ")))
    if (anyNA(dat$S))  parts <- c(parts, paste0("SampleMethod: ", paste(sort(unique(dat$SampleMethod[is.na(dat$S)])), collapse = ", ")))
    if (anyNA(dat$Fu)) parts <- c(parts, paste0("FlumeMethod: ", paste(sort(unique(dat$FlumeMethod[is.na(dat$Fu)])), collapse = ", ")))
    if (anyNA(dat$Cr)) parts <- c(parts, paste0("Crop: ", paste(sort(unique(dat$Crop[is.na(dat$Cr)])), collapse = ", ")))
    msgo <- paste0("Index mapping produced NAs for: ", paste(parts, collapse = " | "), ".")

    if (!isTRUE(drop_unmapped_other)) stop(msgo)
    warning(msgo, " Dropping these rows from d_pred for per-draw export.")
    dat <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(B), !is.na(S), !is.na(Fu), !is.na(Cr))
  }

  if (anyNA(dat$irr_z)) stop("Some irr_z are NA. Check irr_mean/irr_sd and irr_num mapping.")

  # Integer indices
  dat <- dat %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      A  = as.integer(A),
      B  = as.integer(B),
      S  = as.integer(S),
      Fu = as.integer(Fu),
      Y  = as.integer(Y),
      Cr = as.integer(Cr)
    )

  groups <- dat %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Year, analyte_abbr, Treatment) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(analyte_abbr, Year, Treatment)

  out <- vector("list", length = D * nrow(groups))
  kk <- 1L

  for (dd in seq_len(D)) {
    s <- draw_idx[dd]

    for (g in seq_len(nrow(groups))) {

      yr <- groups$Year[g]
      an <- groups$analyte_abbr[g]
      tr <- groups$Treatment[g]

      dsub <- dat %>% dplyr::filter(Year == yr, analyte_abbr == an, Treatment == tr)
      if (nrow(dsub) == 0) next

      # de-duplicate to one row per event_id for analyte
      dsub1 <- dsub %>% dplyr::distinct(event_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

      A  <- dsub1$A;  B <- dsub1$B;  Sidx <- dsub1$S;  Fu <- dsub1$Fu;  Y <- dsub1$Y;  Cr <- dsub1$Cr
      stz <- dsub1$STIR_z
      cin <- dsub1$cin_z
      irz <- dsub1$irr_z               # NEW v1p8
      dup <- dsub1$dup
      res <- dsub1$RES_z
      c_mean <- dsub1$c_mean
      c_sd   <- dsub1$c_sd

      ev <- dsub %>%
        dplyr::distinct(event_id, STIR_z, RES_z, Crop) %>%
        dplyr::left_join(crop_lookup %>% dplyr::select(Cr, Crop), by = "Crop") %>%
        dplyr::mutate(Cr = as.integer(Cr)) %>%
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(Cr))

      muV_z_ev <- post$a_V[s] +
        post$b_V[s]         * ev$STIR_z +
        post$beta_res_V[s]  * ev$RES_z +
        post$gamma_Cr_V[s, ev$Cr]

      Vsum <- sum(V_mean + V_sd * muV_z_ev, na.rm = TRUE)

      muV_z_row <- post$a_V[s] +
        post$b_V[s]         * stz +
        post$beta_res_V[s]  * res +
        post$gamma_Cr_V[s, Cr]

      gB <- post$gamma_B[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, B)]
      gS <- post$gamma_S[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, Sidx)]
      gF <- post$gamma_F[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, Fu)]
      kY <- post$F_year[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(Y, A)]
      gCrC <- post$gamma_Cr[s, , , drop = TRUE][cbind(A, Cr)]

      muC_z <- post$alpha[s, A] +
        post$beta_stir[s, A]  * stz +
        post$beta_cin[s, A]   * cin +
        post$beta_vol[s]      * muV_z_row +
        post$beta_irr[s, A]   * irz +      # NEW v1p8
        post$beta_dup[s, A]   * dup +
        post$beta_res_C[s, A] * res +
        gCrC + gB + gS + gF + kY

      C_raw <- c_mean + c_sd * muC_z
      V_row_raw <- V_mean + V_sd * muV_z_row

      Lmg <- sum(C_raw * V_row_raw, na.rm = TRUE)
      Lg  <- Lmg / 1000
      Cfw <- if (is.finite(Vsum) && Vsum > 0) ((Lg * 1000) / Vsum) else NA_real_

      out[[kk]] <- tibble::tibble(
        draw = dd,
        draw_id = s,
        Year = yr,
        analyte = an,
        treatment = tr,
        volume_L = Vsum,
        conc_fw_mg_L = Cfw,
        load_g = Lg
      )
      kk <- kk + 1L
    }
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out[seq_len(kk - 1L)]) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(analyte, Year, treatment, draw)
}
```

```{r study-period-load-table-kg}
# ============================================================
# Study-period total loads by treatment (Modeled) in kg
# ============================================================

stopifnot(exists("annual_pred_out"))
stopifnot(all(c("analyte","treatment","load_mean","load_low","load_high") %in% names(annual_pred_out)))

study_load_tbl <- annual_pred_out %>%
  dplyr::filter(source == "Bayes_Modeled") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(analyte, treatment) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    load_sum_mean_kg = sum(load_mean, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    load_sum_low_kg  = sum(load_low,  na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    load_sum_high_kg = sum(load_high, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    treatment = factor(as.character(treatment), levels = c("CT","MT","ST"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(analyte, treatment)

study_load_wide <- study_load_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(col = paste0(as.character(treatment), "_mod")) %>%
  dplyr::select(analyte, col,
                load_sum_mean_kg,
                load_sum_low_kg,
                load_sum_high_kg) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = col,
    values_from = c(load_sum_mean_kg,
                    load_sum_low_kg,
                    load_sum_high_kg),
    names_glue  = "{col}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(analyte)

# ---- Save to /out ----
out_file <- file.path("../out",
                      paste0("study_period_total_loads_kg_", model_version, ".csv"))

readr::write_csv(study_load_wide, out_file)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", out_file)

study_load_wide

# ============================================================
# Publication-ready summary (one column per treatment)
# Cells: "mean (low, high)" in kg
# ============================================================

fmt_ci <- function(mean, low, high, digits = 2) {
  ifelse(
    is.finite(mean) & is.finite(low) & is.finite(high),
    paste0(
      formatC(mean, format = "f", digits = digits),
      " (",
      formatC(low,  format = "f", digits = digits),
      ", ",
      formatC(high, format = "f", digits = digits),
      ")"
    ),
    NA_character_
  )
}

study_load_pub <- study_load_wide %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    analyte,
    CT = fmt_ci(CT_mod_load_sum_mean_kg, CT_mod_load_sum_low_kg, CT_mod_load_sum_high_kg, digits = 2),
    MT = fmt_ci(MT_mod_load_sum_mean_kg, MT_mod_load_sum_low_kg, MT_mod_load_sum_high_kg, digits = 2),
    ST = fmt_ci(ST_mod_load_sum_mean_kg, ST_mod_load_sum_low_kg, ST_mod_load_sum_high_kg, digits = 2)
  )

pub_file <- file.path("../out", paste0("study_period_total_loads_kg_pub_", model_version, ".csv"))
readr::write_csv(study_load_pub, pub_file)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", pub_file)

study_load_pub
```


```{r export bayes annual predictions}
# Uncomment to write per-draw table (can be big):
annual_draws <- export_annual_draws(
  post = post,
  d_pred = d_pred,
  years_used = years_used,
  analyte_lookup = analyte_lookup,
  block_lookup = block_lookup,
  sampler_lookup = sampler_lookup,
  flume_lookup = flume_lookup,
  crop_lookup = crop_lookup,
  c_stats = c_stats,
  V_mean = V_mean, V_sd = V_sd,
  stir_mean = stir_mean, stir_sd = stir_sd,
  irr_mean = irr_mean, irr_sd = irr_sd,
  n_draws = 400,
  seed = 1
)

# Save to repo-level out folder (one level up from /code)
export_dir <- "../out"
dir.create(export_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

draws_file <- file.path(
  export_dir,
  paste0("annual_load_draws_bayes_", model_version, ".csv")
)

readr::write_csv(annual_draws, draws_file)
message("[OK] Wrote: ", draws_file)

```
